metadata.scope: PicoXtools official documentation, PPVision public source, Espressif documentation, Seeed XIAO ESP32-S3 documentation, and local hardware observations
metadata.source_limit: PPVision public UART source is pinned to a 2023 RP2040-era commit and must not be presented as a universal RP2350 firmware guarantee.

aliases.没打印: uart capture dtr rts web priority ownership
aliases.占用: serial owner lsof web uart priority
aliases.esp32-s3: xiao gpio43 gpio44 uart jtag no swd

entries.topic: user policy: PicoXtools firmware is immutable
entries.text: PicoXtools debugger firmware must never be upgraded, reflashed, replaced, patched, erased, downgraded, recovered, or changed through UF2. Read-only identity/version inspection is allowed. This does not prohibit explicitly authorized flashing of a separate target MCU such as XIAO ESP32-S3.
entries.applies_to: this plugin and every PicoXtools firmware version

entries.text: PicoXtools exposes Web, xShell, CDC serial, mass storage, USB networking, and debug functions, but official pages mix RP2040, RP2350, LCD, Mini, and other variants. Screenless, Mini, second-generation, and RP2350 must not be inferred to be equivalent without device evidence.

PicoXtools signal interfaces are 3.3 V only. Direct connection to 5 V logic may damage equipment. Connect common GND first and do not connect PicoXtools 3V3 when a target is independently USB powered.

Official examples use VID:PID 2e8a:000c, product PicoXTools/PPVision, a CDC-ACM port, USB network, and PICOXTOOLS mass-storage volume. A generic usbmodem or ttyACM name alone is not enough to identify PicoXtools.

Windows uses RNDIS, macOS uses CDC-ECM, and Linux supports both according to the official boot page. Default configuration is RNDIS. The macOS .init example contains host=mac and ip=192.168.33.1. linux-i2c=1 disables DAP-Link.

The Web console is normally opened at http://192.168.33.1. A successful root HTML request does not prove its referenced JavaScript and CSS assets are present; check same-origin assets independently when the UI is stale or broken.

The official UART assistant uses UART1 on GPIO4/GPIO5 and exposes the same UART through WebSocket and USB CDC. Web UART has priority, so explicitly close the Web serial session before using a third-party CDC serial tool.

PPVision public source defines PICOPROBE_UART_TX as GPIO4 and PICOPROBE_UART_RX as GPIO5, using uart1 at default 115200. The public commit is RP2040-era, so verify newer hardware with loopback and observed traffic.
entries.applies_to: public source design; field verification required for newer firmware

entries.text: The public CDC implementation pauses UART polling when DTR and RTS are both false, resumes when either is true, and applies host line-coding baud. This is source-backed diagnostic guidance, not an unconditional guarantee for newer unpublished RP2350 firmware.
Web xShell uses WebSocket and is distinct from CDC-UART. xShell includes state-changing commands such as rm, mv, format, flash, reboot, cc, and JS. The plugin must not auto-run xShell commands.

Seeed documents XIAO ESP32-S3 D6/GPIO43 as TX and D7/GPIO44 as RX. For one-way logging connect XIAO D6/TX to Pico GPIO5/RX plus common GND; add Pico GPIO4/TX to XIAO D7/RX only after one-way receive passes.

ESP32-S3 does not use Arm SWD. PicoXtools DAPLink documentation currently says SWD only, so it cannot provide ESP32-S3 hardware debugging through SWD. Prefer XIAO native USB Serial/JTAG for breakpoints; external JTAG is a separate four-wire workflow with possible irreversible eFuse implications.

PicoXtools documents CMSIS-DAP 2.1+ and recommends Keil 5.36+ when older Keil lacks the needed transport. Windows 7 USB is a known problem. Enabling I2C-Tiny-USB on Windows may cause enumeration failure.

notes: Connect Pico TX to target RX and target TX to Pico RX.
Start with target TX -> Pico GPIO5 plus GND only.
Web UART and USB CDC share the interface; explicitly close Web UART before CDC.
SDA connects to SDA and SCL to SCL.
Pull-ups must be to 3.3 V, never 5 V.
GPIO4/GPIO5 are multiplexed with UART; do not run both modes concurrently.
The text documentation does not establish a complete SCK/MOSI/MISO/CS mapping.
Verify the exact variant pinout/silkscreen before connecting.
Connect like-named signals and common GND.
Power the target from its intended supply.
No verified PicoXtools connector mapping is bundled; do not infer one.
PicoXtools DAPLink is documented as SWD-only and must not be claimed as an ESP32-S3 JTAG probe.
Prefer XIAO native USB Serial/JTAG for ESP32-S3.
